title: Freshly Optimized
description: The Best Optimization Modpack with all of optifine's features but BETTER with some QOL mods.
body: This is the best optimization modpack with all of optifines features like zoom and connected textures, this also has world edit and better f3 screen for QOL, because the default f3 screen is very bad and world edit is just super handy for creative mode, and it also has freecam without cheats cause why not, and no those QOL mods dont impact performance its just QOL.
